why_this_action.summary: Fresh Codeberg movement shifted the bottleneck away from primary-repo-flat distribution, so the selector needed to stop escalating the same empty-board hold window into guard-pause churn.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
distribution_lane_latest.json: guard-pause churn was still reachable after the star movement
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet remained in the active review window
market_intelligence_latest.json: reuse existing conversion/distribution truths instead of inventing a new packet

result.summary: Patched the selector so fresh Codeberg movement suppresses stale distribution-architecture guard churn, added regression coverage, and refreshed the latest board artifacts.
